Headline: Flag of Saxony-Anhalt
Description: The flag of Saxony-Anhalt is a yellow and black bi-color, with the state's coat of arms centered on the flag.

Headline: Krężna-Kolonia
Description: Krężna-Kolonia [ˈkrɛ̃ʐna kɔˈlɔɲa] is a village in the administrative district of Gmina Wola Krzysztoporska, within Piotrków County, Łódź Voivodeship, in central Poland.[1]

Headline: Fernando de Mompox y Zayas
Description: Fernando de Mompox y Zayas (fl. 1730–1731) (alternatively spelled "de Mómpo y Zayas", without an x) was a leader in the Revolt of the Comuneros of Paraguay.  His presence in Paraguay in 1730–1731 was short but influential; despite being an outsider, he quickly became the most influential man in the region in only 6 months.  He was a fiery orator who provided an ideological backing for the actions of the rebel comuneros that took over the province from 1731 to 1735.

Headline: 2005 Ottawa Renegades season
Description: The 2005 Ottawa Renegades season was the fourth and final season for the team in the Canadian Football League (CFL). The Renegades finished the season with a 7–11 record and failed to make the playoffs.

Headline: Polistes actaeon
Description: Polistes actaeon is a species of social paper wasp found in southern Brazil.[2]
